name: Monster Man Rush
description: Get ready for an exciting journey in Monster Rush, a fast-paced endless running game full of thrilling challenges, colorful environments, and exciting gameplay. Step into a world where monsters are on the move, and your mission is to run, dodge, and survive as long as possible. With smooth controls and addictive mechanics, this game offers non-stop action for players of all ages.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
